Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Class AIcCustomVersionFormat

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcCustomVersionFormat
All Implemented Interfaces:
eu.algites.lib.common.enums.AIiEnumItem, AIiVersionFormat, Serializable
public final class AIcCustomVersionFormat extends Object implements AIiVersionFormat, Serializable

Title: AIcCustomVersionFormat

Description: Simple reusable implementation of AIiVersionFormat.

    • qualifierDelimiter

      @Nonnull public String qualifierDelimiter()
      Description copied from interface: AIiVersionFormat
      Delimiter used to start a qualifier/prerelease section in the version part (e.g. - in SemVer).
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      qualifier delimiter

    • qualifierTokenDelimiter

      @Nonnull public String qualifierTokenDelimiter()
      Description copied from interface: AIiVersionFormat
      Token delimiter used inside the qualifier/prerelease section (e.g. . in SemVer).

      qualifier token delimiter
